tasks: Record an audio clip using Audio Recorder app and save it.
Record an audio clip and save it with name "copy_conference.m4a" using Audio Recorder app.

Open the file task.html in Downloads in the file manager; when prompted open it with Chrome. Then create a drawing using the three colors shown at the top and hit submit. The available colors can be selected with just one Tap.

Open the file task.html in Downloads in the file manager; when prompted open it with Chrome. Black squares represent unreachable walls. Then navigate the X to the bottom-right green cell, by using the direction buttons.

actions.description: Launch the Files app to access the Downloads folder.

tasks: Open the file task.html in Downloads in the file manager; when prompted open it with Chrome. Then create a drawing using the three colors shown at the top and hit submit. The available colors can be selected with just one Tap.

actions.description: Tap on "Just once" to open the file with Chrome.

tasks: In Simple Calendar Pro, create a calendar event on 2023-10-16 at 18h with the title 'Review session for Budget Planning' and the description 'We will prepare for product launch. Remember to confirm attendance.'. The event should last for 30 mins.

In Simple Calendar Pro, create a calendar event on 2023-10-25 at 14h with the title 'Appointment for Project X' and the description 'We will understand software updates. Let's be punctual.'. The event should last for 30 mins.

In Simple Calendar Pro, create a calendar event in two weeks from today at 22h with the title 'Catch up on Campaign' and the description 'We will strategize about client feedback. Please bring relevant documents.'. The event should last for 15 mins.
In Simple Calendar Pro, create a calendar event for this Friday at 11h with the title 'Call with the Team' and the description 'We will explore product launch.'. The event should last for 45 mins.

In Simple Calendar Pro, create a calendar event for tomorrow at 15h with the title 'Meeting with HR' and the description 'We will explore annual budget. Looking forward to productive discussions.'. The event should last for 60 mins.

In Simple Calendar Pro, create a recurring calendar event titled 'Review session for Campaign' starting on 2023-10-20 at 12h. The event recurs weekly, forever, and lasts for 45 minutes each occurrence. The event description should be 'We will discuss marketing strategies.'.

In Simple Calendar Pro, create a recurring calendar event titled 'Workshop on Project X' starting on 2023-10-21 at 21h. The event recurs weekly, forever, and lasts for 45 minutes each occurrence. The event description should be 'We will finalize marketing strategies. Snacks will be provided.'.

actions.description: Launch the Calendar app to create a new event.
Tap the "Paused" indicator to start the stopwatch.

tasks: Create a new contact for Alejandro da Silva. Their number is +16131829971. (name: Alejandro da Silva, phone: +16131829971)
Go to the new contact screen and enter the following details: First Name: Ivan, Last Name: Brown, Phone: 613-403-6772, Phone Label: Home. Do NOT hit save. (phone: 613-403-6772)

Launch the Contacts app to begin creating a new contact.
